arts.ttl: Alexander Isak gets Wembley assurances after Newcastle United's training PR stunt
arts.sum: When asked if Isak will be hungry to make up for Wembley disappointment last time around, Howe said: "He is very very motivated to score. It's amazing to think that the last time Newcastle United ventured to Wembley for the Carabao Cup final in 2023, Alexander Isak was a mere substitute.

arts.ttl: Hidden goal bonus is perfect timing for battered Newcastle United squad
arts.sum: Who knows, it could be even more if Alexander Isak or Harvey Barnes get on the scoresheet before Callum Wilson comes off the bench, if that's how Eddie Howe lines his side up at the London Stadium. It's not beyond the realms of credibility to suggest Newcastle United could, at some stage in Monday night's Premier League clash with West Ham, boast a forward line with a combined 23 goals against the Hammers.

arts.ttl: “Worried” | West Ham’s take on Lucas Paquetá’s court hearing
arts.sum: West Ham United fear that Lucas Paquetá will lose his spot-fixing case as the FA wants the Brazilian to be banned for life. Paquetá’s hearing is expected to start this month, and senior figures at West Ham are reportedly not hopeful of a positive outcome. The main reason for the club’s lack of confidence is... The post “Worried” | West Ham’s take on Lucas Paquetá’s court hearing appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak 'one more season' at Newcastle United warning amid Liverpool whispers
arts.sum: Former Newcastle United midfielder Didi Hamann has warned his old club they won't be able to keep hold of Alexander Isak and Anthony Gordon unless they are regularly in the Champions League. Hamman, asked about whether Newcastle need to qualify for the Champions League to keep the duo, said: "In this case, if you don't play there one more season, maybe the players say, yeah, that's fine.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United Wembley distraction dismissed with 'highly motivated' statement
arts.sum: Potter is expecting a tough challenge on Monday evening, and feels next weekend's Wembley date will play no part in Newcastle's preparations. "They will be looking for the best way to prepare for a cup final, which will be to win a Premier League game, so I am expecting a tough game against a highly motivated team.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle and West Ham make contact with the agent of Serie A striker
arts.sum: Premier League clubs are looking for a striker in the summer transfer window, particularly Newcastle United and West Ham United. Both the clubs need reinforcements to their attack after this season showed that they are lacking in depth when it comes to options upfront. One of the players on their radar is former Chelsea attacker […] The post Exclusive: Newcastle and West Ham make contact with the agent of Serie A striker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United offered star with £82.5m clause as Jonathan David edges closer to exit decision
arts.sum: Aghehowa, who won a gold medal after winning the football tournament at the Paris Olympics last summer, fits the bill in terms of age and profile in the next phase of Newcastle's recruitment. If experienced striker Callum Wilson is to be released at the end of his contract, with Eddie Howe open to a deal for the no.9 but knowing he could be overruled, a younger understudy for Alexander Isak is what Newcastle are looking for.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United and Sunderland in battle for Scottish sensation on Liverpool's radar
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Sunderland could be set for a summer transfer tug-of-war over Scottish teenage midfield sensation Lennon Miller. Scotland Under-21 star Miller has played 30 times for Motherwell this season already, scoring four goals and contributing four assists, and has made 67 senior appearances for the club in his career to date, despite his young age.

arts.ttl: 7 Ligue 1 stars on Newcastle United radar as Paul Mitchell uses transfer contact book
arts.sum: After three transfer windows with relatively little in the way of incoming signings, the summer of 2025 has to be significant for Newcastle United . Already, we've seen several French-based players linked with a move to Tyneside, with Lens star Abdukodir Khusanov close to a move before Manchester City stepped in, while Newcastle have already brought Bruno Guimaraes and Sven Botman from the French league.

arts.ttl: Newcastle transfer news: Eddie Howe's side could sign £82.5m striker for 'reduced fee' amid Alexander Isak, Callum Wilson uncertainty
arts.sum: Newcastle United are one of a number of European clubs who have been handed a boost in their pursuit of an in-demand striker this summer, according to a report.
